activity: Check for short dumps in ST22
doc_description: Checked the system for runtime errors using the ST22 transaction. No critical ABAP dumps were found during the review period. System is running cleanly.
Reviewed scheduled and completed background jobs via SM37. Two jobs were found in a 'Cancelled' state due to missing variant. Manual re-trigger required. All other jobs completed successfully.
Reviewed the system log in SM21 for the past 7 days. No critical entries or recurring errors were detected. Minor informational messages noted but no action required.
Current tablespace utilisation is at 82%, approaching the 85% warning threshold. Archiving old data is recommended within the next 5 business days to prevent growth issues.
All application servers responded successfully to availability checks. No downtime was recorded during the reporting period. Uptime: 100%.

Detected 47 failed login attempts within a 24-hour window originating from a single user ID. Potential brute-force activity suspected. User account has been locked pending investigation. Security team has been notified.
Transport queue was reviewed via STMS. All pending transports for the week have been imported successfully into the target landscape. No errors or conflicts reported.
